title: Add pesto port forwarding with source IP preservation
body:
Move pesto port forwarding logic from libpod into container-libs, enabling dynamic IPv6/dual-stack port forwarding with source IP preservation for rootless bridge networking.

Changes:
- Add IPv6 and multi-IP routing tests for pesto forwarder
- Vendor updated container-libs with pesto port management
- Remove libpod pesto code in favor of container-libs implementation

Tests skip on hosts without a default IPv6 route since pasta requires routable IPv6 for TAP-based forwarding.

Depends on: https://github.com/podman-container-tools/container-libs/pull/1004
